description: An analyst needs to run a report to understand which marketing channels are driving the most conversions.

nodes.task_description: Open the multi-channel funnels report in Google Analytics.

expected_outcome.value: Agent navigates to the correct report.

nodes.task_description: Compare different attribution models (e.g., Last Click vs. Linear) to see how credit is distributed across channels.

expected_outcome.value: Agent analyzes the data using multiple attribution models.

nodes.task_description: Generate a summary insight, such as 'While Organic Search drives the most last-click conversions, Paid Social is a key channel for introducing new users.'

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a nuanced insight based on comparing attribution models.
